programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: (M) Older bachelor Michael falls for alluring psychic Janis, who sees him as an easy mark for a con. But Michael's concerned relative, Virginia, threatens to expose Janis's motives.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: (M) An American exchange student in Paris falls for her host family's son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: (M) A man agrees to take a job as the "live-in" manservant to a wealthy businesswoman. He then realizes he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
